# NexaSetu
> AI-powered project orchestration for engineering teams.

NexaSetu turns GitHub activity into real-time execution intelligence. 
It predicts risks, eliminates bottlenecks, and drives software delivery.

## Key Features
- Proactive risk analysis for sprints
- Codebase sync with GitHub
- Enterprise security with zero data loss
- Velocity tracking and bottleneck detection

## Contact
